name: python3-blosc
title: python3-blosc
summary: Python 3 bindings for the Blosc meta-compressor
description:
Python 3 bindings for the Blosc meta-compressor
Blosc (http://blosc.org) is a high performance compressor optimized for
binary data. It has been designed to transmit data to the processor cache
faster than the traditional, non-compressed, direct memory fetch approach
via a memcpy() OS call.
.
This package provides the official Python bindings in the Python 3 import
path.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-blosc because Python 3 bindings for the Blosc meta-compressor.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-blosc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-blosc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-blosc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
